about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: We connect wine lovers with the best wine experiences from Argentina and the world

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.paragraph1: At Rewine, we believe wine is more than a beverage: it's an experience that connects people, cultures, and traditions. Our mission is to democratize access to wine knowledge and create a community where both experts and beginners can discover, learn, and share their passion for wine.
mission.paragraph2: We use cutting-edge technology, including artificial intelligence, to offer personalized recommendations, detailed wine profiles, and comparisons that help our users make informed decisions.
mission.paragraph3: We work hand in hand with wineries, sommeliers, and industry experts to ensure our platform offers accurate, up-to-date, and relevant information for all knowledge levels.

values.title: Our Values
values.qualityDesc: We are committed to providing accurate information and exceptional experiences
values.communityDesc: We foster connections among wine lovers from around the world
values.innovationDesc: We use advanced technology to enhance the user experience
values.sustainabilityDesc: We promote responsible practices in the wine industry

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: A team passionate about wine and technology

cta.title: Join our community
cta.description: Discover amazing wines, participate in exclusive events, and connect with other wine lovers

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We're here to help. Write to us and we'll respond as soon as possible

form.title: Send us a message
form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Your message was sent successfully. We'll respond soon.
form.error: There was an error sending your message. Please try again.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How can I add my winery to Rewine?
faq.a1: Contact us through the form selecting 'Partnerships and collaborations' and we'll send you all the necessary information.
faq.a2: Yes, Rewine is completely free for users. You can explore wines, write reviews, and manage your personal cellar at no cost.
faq.q3: How does the AI comparison work?
faq.a3: Our AI analyzes the characteristics of the selected wines and generates a detailed comparison with personalized recommendations.
faq.q4: Can I organize events on Rewine?
faq.a4: Yes, if you're a partner you can create and manage your own events. Contact us for more information on how to become a partner.
